# InviteToProgramCommand

**Device Management Command**

The command to invite a user to join the Volume Purchase Program (VPP).

## Declaration

```swift
object InviteToProgramCommand
```

## Objects

- **InviteToProgramCommand.Command**: The command to invite a user to join the Volume Purchase Program (VPP).

## Commands and responses

- **InviteToProgramResponse**: A response from the device after it processes the command to invite a user to join the Volume Purchase Program (VPP).
